payload.label: pillow
payload.long_description: Close-up of a rumpled white/cream cotton pillow with wrinkled pillowcase and soft, plush fill; the pillow is partially cut off at the image edge with a beige striped blanket or sheet visible alongside; image appears low-resolution/pixelated; estimated distance ~0.4 m from camera.
